character.name: Heroic fantasy warrior for a 2D metroidvania. Full body. Standing idle. Side view facing right. Height 48-56 pixels. Clean silhouette. Large readable shapes. Simple steel armor with leather straps. Short blue cape. One-handed sword. No shield. Limited color palette (16-24 colors). Consistent pixel size. Handcrafted pixel art. SNES-inspired but modern. Game-ready sprite. No concept art. No illustration. No painterly shading. No realistic textures. Transparent background.
